title: Step 4: Add a fixed /blog with Post child entries

content.text: Create a Blog entry fixed at /blog and Post child entries with editable path. Then wire dedicated page.tsx handlers for the listing and post detail pages.

body.code:
app/
├ page.tsx
├ layout.tsx
├ blog/page.tsx
╰ blog/[slug]/page.tsx

entries/
├ landing/
│ ├ LandingPage.tsx
│ ╰ LandingPage.schema.tsx
├ blog/
│ ├ BlogPage.tsx
│ ├ BlogPostPage.tsx
│ ├ BlogPage.schema.tsx
│ ╰ PostPage.schema.tsx
╰ settings/
  ├ SiteLayout.tsx
  ╰ SiteLayout.schema.tsx

blocks/
├ text/
│ ├ TextBlock.tsx
│ ╰ TextBlock.schema.tsx
├ image/
│ ├ ImageBlock.tsx
│ ╰ ImageBlock.schema.tsx
╰ gallery/
  ├ GalleryBlock.tsx
  ╰ GalleryBlock.schema.tsx

cms.tsx

content.text: Add separate schemas for the fixed blog overview entry and its post children.
Implement the blog listing view with Infer-based prop types, then make the post detail page a server component that fetches post and sibling navigation data.
Update the Pages root to include the blog entry and seed multiple posts.
Add dedicated Next.js routes for the blog index and individual post pages.
